abort.device_not_supported: This device is not supported. Only P1 meters are supported.
abort.wrong_device: The configured device is not the same found on this IP address.

error.button_not_pressed: The button on the P1 dongle was not pressed, or the 30-second window expired. Press the button once and try again.
error.network_error: Device unreachable – check the IP address and that the device is on your network.
error.invalid_token: The stored token was rejected by the device. Please re-authenticate.

user.title: Configure device
user.description: Enter the IP address of your HomeWizard P1 meter.

data_description.ip_address: The IP address of your HomeWizard P1 meter.

authorize.title: Authorize HomeAssistant
authorize.description:
Press the button on your P1 dongle **once**, then click **Submit** within 30 seconds.

Device: `{ip_address}`

discovery_confirm.title: Confirm
discovery_confirm.description: Found {product_type} (serial: {serial}) at {ip_address}. Press **Confirm** and then press the button on the dongle to authorize access.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize
reauth_confirm.description: Your API token has been revoked. Press the button on the P1 dongle at `{ip_address}` **once**, then click **Submit** within 30 seconds.

data_description.ip_address: The new IP address of your HomeWizard P1 meter.

communication_error.message: Failed to communicate with the device. Check the IP address and network connectivity.
